response.justification: Strong full-stack candidate with 10+ years of experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Solid TypeScript/Node.js background across multiple senior roles (Optilyz, RIDE Capital, re:cinq), current exposure to AI agent infrastructure and MCP, and demonstrated experience with React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and TDD practices. Some gaps in explicit Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin experience, but the depth of engineering craftsmanship, polyglot background, and AI tooling work align well with the role.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js and React track record
Current AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generator work directly matches requirement
Demonstrated software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based dev, teaching/workshops
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in the primary stack
Kotlin/Java secondary stack experience is limited (mostly older Java with robotics)
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate less recent depth in the primary stack

key_factors.factor: TypeScript/Node.js seniority and AI agent work
